title: 9 Archiving Closed Trace Requests
body_text:
9	Archiving Closed Trace Requests
9.1	Archiving Closed Trace Requests
Closed trace requests are automatically archived after seven calendar days, but Tracers and SuperTracers can initiate the archive process any time before this deadline. Archived trace requests are removed from the OLT Inbox but are accessible through the Search Trace Request function.
A Tracer or SuperTracer proceeds as follows to archive a trace request:
Log in to OLT, as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to OLT.
Select the closed trace in the Inbox that you want to archive. See Figure 1.
Note:	Closed traces with a status of âclosed â pending adjustmentâ canât be archived.
Figure 1: Select Trace
Select
Archive this Trace Request
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Archive Trace
Select
OK
to confirm the request.
END
